title: Scanner Allowlist
description: Schema for scanner allowlist files under tools/scanners/. The file wraps a list of allowlist entries. Each entry is either a single-identifier form (uses `target`) or a relational form (uses `from`+`to`). Every entry MUST include `rationale`, `addedBy`, and `addedAt`.

target.description: Single-identifier form: what is being allowlisted (file path, symbol, table name, etc.)

from.description: Relational form: source side of the relation being allowlisted (logical identifier such as `<domain>.<entity-name>`)

to.description: Relational form: target side of the relation being allowlisted (logical identifier such as `<domain>.<entity-name>`)

followUp.description: Optional: wave or plan reference for closure
